step_rationale: Triglyceride hydrolysis, regulated lipoprotein metabolism controlling atherogenic substrate.
mechanism: Rate-limiting enzyme hydrolyzing triglycerides in atherogenic lipoproteins, regulated by ANGPTL inhibitors.
